meaning: n.神经,胆量,勇气,叶脉vt.鼓起勇气
examples: Every nerve in her body was tense.
He lost his nerve at the last minute.
The optic nerve is a part of the brain.
Fluker was just 11 years old when doctors discovered a peripheral nerve sheath tumor.
It will be years before anyone has the nerve to call you on it.
